title: cheilanthes sulphurea
intro: Cheilanthes sulphurea, also known as the yellow lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae, characterized by its bright yellow leaf margins and distinctive lip-like fringes. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes sulphurea are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Cheilanthes sulphurea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
